rules.name: chronology_preserved
rules.description: Timeline anchors must never move implicitly between scenes.

rules.name: character_knowledge_preserved
rules.description: Character knowledge cannot exceed reveal-authorized boundaries.

rules.name: world_rule_preserved
rules.description: Setting rules remain stable across all episodes.

rules.name: promise_tracking_preserved
rules.description: Open and resolved threads must remain explicitly declared.

rules.name: repair_manual_only
rules.description: Continuity fixes remain human-approved and are not auto-applied.

rules.name: provider_zero_preserved
rules.description: No continuity step may trigger live provider calls.
